items.caption: A vintage-style poster depicting the 1987 market crash, also known as black monday. the poster features a stylized graph with a sharp decline in market value, indicating the rapid fall of stock prices on october 19, 1987. the graph is set against a beige background with a decorative border. the title "1987 crash djia" is prominently displayed at the top, with "market moments" written below it. the poster includes annotations and data points related to the crash, such as the dow jones industrial average (djia) and various market events. the overall design evokes a sense of historical significance and financial turmoil.
